name: Miles Keffer
intro: Welcome to my website. Below you can find information about me, my projects that I have completed, my experience, and where to contact me.
summary: While my concentration within computer science is on embedded systems and robotics, I also have explored other areas of interest such as developing games, software, web applications, and backend systems. I try to compete in extracurricular programs that allow me to apply my skills. I am currently seeking internship opportunities for the summer of 2026.
availability: Looking for part or full-time work opportunities. Available for freelance work.
